data.description: White House: Due to popular demand from the press, President Trump’s news conference tomorrow will now take place in the White House Briefing Room. 1PM ET.
ABC on Trump: If Iran fails to reach an agreement within 48 hours, we will blow up the entire country

data.title: Lawyer believes Drift incident could be considered civil negligence. Attack worth $280M linked to North Korean hackers.
data.description: The attack on Drift Protocol, amounting to $280 million, is believed to have been conducted by cyber criminals associated with hackers linked to the North Korean government.
Inhibikase Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)

data.title: Naoris introduces quantum-safe blockchain as Bitcoin, Ethereum face threat. Crypto industry gears up.
data.description: Naoris Protocol has announced the implementation of quantum-resistant cryptography within its blockchain network. This security feature aims to protect the network and its users from potential threats posed by quantum computing. As the crypto industry continues to evolve, this proactive measure serves as a safeguard against emerging vulnerabilities.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico Announces the Obtaining of Independent Assurance on the KPI of Its Sustainability-Linked Bonds “GAP 22L,” “GAP 23L,” “GAP 23-2L,” “GAP 24L,” and “GAP 24-2L”
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on March 23, 2026, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) has disclosed that for its sustainability-linked bonds known as “GAP 22L,” “GAP 23L,” “GAP 23-2L,” “GAP 24L,” and “GAP 24-2L,” it has secured the necessary assurance under its Sustainability-Linked Financing Frameworks. This includes emissions inventory assurance from Ruby Canyon and a limited assurance report from KPMG Cárdenas Dosal, S.C., an independent entity, concerning the relevant Key Performance Indicator tied to these bonds.
Trilogy Metals Reports First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results and Provides Update on U.S. Federal Strategic Investment and Project Advancement

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Trump Says This; Cathie Wood Snaps Up IPO Stock Amid 84% Dive (Live Coverage)
data.description: Following President Trump's remarks on Iran, the Dow Jones saw an increase in value. A pharmaceutical company made its debut on the stock market, and prominent investor Cathie Wood made significant stock purchases. Live coverage reported a notable 84% decline in an IPO stock.

data.title: VEON to Release FY25 Earnings Update on March 13, 2026
data.description: On February 26, 2026, VEON Ltd. announced they will release their selected consolidated financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and full-year period ending December 31, 2025, at 8:00 GST (0:00 EST) on March 13, 2026. VEON Ltd. is a global digital operator listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol VEON.

data.title: Circle introduces cirBTC, a new token to enhance Bitcoin utility, issued by the stablecoin issuer – giving BTC more use.
data.description: Circle, a stablecoin issuer traded publicly, has announced the release of a new token named cirBTC. This token serves as a proprietary alternative to wrapped Bitcoin.

data.title: Burckhardt Compression secures major order from Hanwha Ocean for next-generation LNG carrier series featuring new BOG compressor technology
data.description: A major contract has been secured by Burckhardt Compression from Hanwha Ocean in South Korea. The deal involves the supply of 14 boil-off gas (BOG) compressors.

data.title: Google researchers outline 6 attack categories on AI agents, targeting from invisible HTML to multi-agent flash crashes.
data.description: A recent study by Google DeepMind identifies six attack categories that can target autonomous AI agents. These attacks range from invisible HTML commands to multi-agent flash crashes. The paper highlights the need for increased security measures to protect AI technology from such threats.
Quhuo Reports Financial Results for the Second Half and Full Year 2025

data.title: Elon Musk's company making moves to tackle crypto scams - Exec says changes could eliminate 99% of incentive.
data.description: Elon Musk's latest move to crack down on crypto scams has the potential to eliminate nearly all illicit activity in the industry, according to a top executive. The changes are expected to effectively target 99% of the incentive for fraudulent schemes. This development comes amid heightened scrutiny on cryptocurrency-related fraud, with Musk's intervention likely to address and reduce such activities significantly.

data.title: TTW Reveals Top 100 Convention Centers in the World for 2026
data.description: The latest report from Travel And Tour World (TTW) unveils the rankings of top venues worldwide for Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, and Exhibitions (MICE) that play a significant role in promoting trade, innovation, and business tourism on a global scale. The report, titled "TTW Reveals Top," was released on April 5, 2026, in New York. This comprehensive research provides insights into the key locations driving the MICE industry, catering to a growing number of events and conventions around the world.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Loom As Trump Says Iran Faces 'Hell' If No Deal; Sandisk Leads 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: The President issued a warning of massive strikes on Tuesday, declaring that Iran could face severe consequences if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. Currently, efforts are being made to boost market activity despite uncertainties. Keep an eye out for the most recent developments. Dow Jones Futures are on the horizon following President Trump's remarks about Iran potentially enduring harsh retaliation if a resolution is not reached. Additionally, Sandisk is among the seven stocks being closely monitored. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Antier Introduces In-Wallet Equity Perpetual Trading & Swaps for Unified Market Access
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Antier revealed a significant update to its crypto wallet services by incorporating in-wallet equity perpetual trading and swap features. This enhancement aims to provide a cohesive and efficient trading experience for users in the realm of digital finance.

data.title: Chances of US targeting Iran in 2022 now at 63% post Trump's statement, amid conflicting war signals.
data.description: The leader of the United States is sending conflicting messages regarding the war, indicating both an increase in conflict and a potential resolution within a matter of weeks.

data.title: BIELAT SANTORE & COMPANY ANNOUNCES SALE OF LANDMARK "OFFICE LOUNGE"
data.description: A renowned hospitality real estate firm in New Jersey, Bielat Santore & Company, recently disclosed the successful transaction involving the sale of The Office Lounge. This iconic restaurant and bar, situated at 820 Main Street in Toms River, has been a fixture in the community for over fifty years. The sale marks a significant milestone in the establishment's history, reflecting its enduring popularity and appeal to patrons.

data.title: Token oversupply undermines value growth - Blockworks' Michael Ippolito warns, with rising concerns on crypto sustainability.
data.description: Michael Ippolito from Blockworks has noticed a significant increase in token supply, which is causing returns to be diluted. This increase is breaking the connection between the fundamentals of cryptocurrencies and their prices. He has raised concerns about the long-term sustainability of the crypto model due to this surge in token supply.
